summary: Decent soundboard capture of a mixed‑quality show that shines in its second set with standout Deal, Black Peter and jam highlights.
review: The recording is a solid soundboard (B+ to nice‑sounding) though some listeners note it isn’t crystal clear. The concert starts unevenly – weak vocals and a sloppy first set – but recovers strongly in the second half with high‑energy performances of Deal, Black Peter, Women Are Smarter, Candyman and jammed sections of Supplication, Bird Song and Lazy Lightning.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 3‑4 stars and praise several songs while noting a weak first set; recording quality is described as decent but not great, yielding an overall mid‑to‑upper‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally praised as a B+ or nice‑sounding SB; some note the sound isn’t great or has occasional drop‑outs, but keyboards (Brent's B‑3) are highlighted as sweet.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is uneven with weak vocals and a few missteps, but the second set lifts the concert with strong transitions and high‑energy jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Good performance on Black Peter; overall solid guitar work noted.
band_member_comments.Bob: Vocals described as weak on the first set.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's B‑3 organ sounds sweet and adds to the positive feel of the show.
